text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur gets injured during training, so I take
her to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Tch. Might've been thinkin' too much while I was
running. Such a dumb mistake.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But whatever. I can overcome little irregularities
like this, no problem.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I'm all patched up. Let's get back to
training.
choice_data_list: You should get some proper rest.
Sure, but let's keep it light.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
That supposed to be a joke? Injuries like this are
a dime a dozen.
choice_data_list:
An injury is an injury. If we're talking in binary
code, it's a 1, not a 0.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Tch... Spare me the stupid analogies, will you?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
It's a waste of time talking to you. I'm gonna head
back to my room and compile data. I take it you
don't have a problem with that?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur returns to her dorm looking
dissatisfied.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'll be the one to decide whether to take it easy or
not. Either way, efficiency is gonna take a hit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, we make our way to the track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I get her to start with a light jog, but Air Shakur's
face twists in pain.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Tch... So this isn't gonna go my way either, huh?
choice_data_list: It's probably best if we call it a day.
It's probably best if we call it a day.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Way to state the obvious. Geez...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur returns to her dorm, grumbling
unhappily.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
It should be fine if I keep it light. That way I won't
lose my edge.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
While we're at it, let's get some data on my
performance while injured.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur keeps her training light and takes care
not to aggravate her injury.
